title: `Position` result is inconsistent with mysql
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```sql
use test;
drop table t;
create table t(s varchar(30));
insert into t values("wsfaAaFWE");
select s, position("aaa" in s) from t;
```

<!-- a step by step guide for reproducing the bug. -->

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

```sql
mysql> select s, position("aaa" in s) from t; 
+-----------+----------------------+
| s         | position("aaa" in s) |
+-----------+----------------------+
| wsfaAaFWE |                    4 |
+-----------+----------------------+

mysql> select position("aaa" in "wsfaAaFWE") from t; 
+--------------------------------+
| position("aaa" in "wsfaAaFWE") |
+--------------------------------+
|                              4 |
+--------------------------------+
```

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

```sql
mysql> select s, position("aaa" in s) from t;
+-----------+----------------------+
| s         | position("aaa" in s) |
+-----------+----------------------+
| wsfaAaFWE |                    0 |
+-----------+----------------------+

mysql> select position("aaa" in "wsfaAaFWE") from t;
+--------------------------------+
| position("aaa" in "wsfaAaFWE") |
+--------------------------------+
|                              4 |
+--------------------------------+
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), description TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'Sample', 'This is a sample description.');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'Example', NULL);
SELECT name, POSITION('Sample' IN name) AS position_sample FROM test_table;
SELECT name, POSITION('Sample' IN COALESCE(description, '')) AS position_description FROM test_table;
key_bug_features: Inconsistent position function results in TiDB and MySQL
